title: physaria purpurea
intro: Physaria purpurea, also known as Rocky Mountain Bladderpod, is a perennial herb native to the western United States and Canada. It is a member of the mustard family and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been used to treat various health conditions, such as arthritis, sore throats, and digestive issues, due to its anti-inflammatory properties and ability to promote healing. Physaria purpurea can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, making it a versatile herbal remedy for a range of health benefits.
